name: Venice AI
description: Privacy-first, OpenAI-compatible API for chat, image generation (Grok Imagine, Nano Banana, Venice SD 3.5, gpt-image-2), text-to-speech (multiple TTS engines + voice cloning handles), and image upscaling. Bearer-token auth; no data retention on Venice's side.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Venice AI API Key — create one at https://venice.ai/settings/api

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image via Venice's POST /images/generations. Supports grok-imagine-image, gpt-image-2, venice-sd35, qwen-image-2, nano-banana-pro, and others (call list_models?type=image for the live set). Returns base64 image data by default (return_binary=false). Most Venice-specific knobs (style_preset, hide_watermark, safe_mode, variants) are exposed.

model.description: Image model id — e.g. grok-imagine-image (default), gpt-image-2, venice-sd35, qwen-image-2, nano-banana-pro. Use list_models?type=image for the authoritative list.

negative_prompt.description: Things to steer the image away from (up to 7500 chars).

width.description: Image width in pixels (1–1280). Pixel-sized models (venice-sd35) honour this; aspect-ratio models (nano-banana, qwen-image-2) ignore it — use aspect_ratio + resolution instead.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio (aspect-ratio models only — nano-banana, qwen-image-2). e.g. 1:1, 16:9, 3:2.

resolution.description: Resolution tier (resolution-tier models only — gpt-image-2, nano-banana-pro).

cfg_scale.description: Adherence to prompt (0–20, model-specific defaults). Higher = more literal, lower = more creative.

steps.description: Diffusion steps (model-specific default; some models ignore this).

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility (-999999999 to 999999999). 0 = random.

style_preset.description: Style preset — e.g. '3D Model', 'Photographic', 'Anime', 'Digital Art'. Model-specific support.

hide_watermark.description: Suppress the Venice watermark. Venice may override for certain content.

return_binary.description: Return raw image bytes instead of JSON+base64. Default false (returns JSON with base64 image strings).

variants.description: Number of image variants to generate (1–4). Only honoured when return_binary=false.

lora_strength.description: LoRA strength when the chosen model supports adapters (0–100).

embed_exif_metadata.description: Embed generation metadata in the image EXIF block.

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completion via POST /chat/completions. Venice extras (web search, character_slug, thinking control) ride on `venice_parameters`.

model.description: Text model id — e.g. venice-uncensored, llama-3.3-70b, qwen-2.5-coder-32b, deepseek-r1-671b. Use list_models?type=text for the live set.

tools.name: text_to_speech
tools.description: Generate speech audio via POST /audio/speech. Returns binary audio (Content-Type matches `response_format`). Supports voice cloning handles (vv_<slug>) alongside the curated voice catalog.

voice.description: Voice id — curated catalog (af_sky, af_bella, af_nova, am_adam, am_echo, bm_daniel, eve, Vivian, Rachel, Aria, …) OR a cloned-voice handle matching vv_<slug>.

tools.name: upscale_image
tools.description: Upscale or enhance an image via POST /images/upscale. Inputs accept base64 or remote URL bytes (≤25 MB, ≥65536 px, ≤16777216 px after scaling).

image.description: Source image — base64 string or fetchable URL.

enhance.description: Apply enhancement pass. Required when scale=1.

enhanceCreativity.description: How much the enhancer may invent (0–1).

enhancePrompt.description: Optional style hint for the enhancer (≤1500 chars).

replication.description: How faithfully to preserve the source (0–1).

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available models via GET /models. Filter by `type` — image | text | tts | video | music | upscale | inpaint | embedding | asr | code | all.

type.description: Model family filter. 'all' returns every model.
